examples.title: Transfer Learning Example
examples.description: An example of transfer learning using a pretrained model and fine-tuning.
examples.code:
import tensorflow as tf
from tensorflow import keras

# Load the pretrained model
model = keras.applications.VGG16(weights='imagenet', include_top=False, input_shape=(224, 224, 3))

# Freeze the layers of the pretrained model
for layer in model.layers:
    layer.trainable = False

# Add new layers to the model
x = model.output
x = keras.layers.GlobalAveragePooling2D()(x)

# Compile the model
model.compile(optimizer='adam', loss='categorical_crossentropy', metrics=['accuracy'])
examples.explanation: This code example demonstrates transfer learning using a pretrained VGG16 model and fine-tuning. The pretrained model is loaded and the layers are frozen. New layers are added to the model, and it is compiled with the Adam optimizer and categorical cross-entropy loss.

examples.title: Feature Extraction Example
examples.description: An example of feature extraction using a pretrained model.
examples.code:
import tensorflow as tf
from tensorflow import keras

# Load the pretrained model
model = keras.applications.VGG16(weights='imagenet', include_top=False, input_shape=(224, 224, 3))

# Extract features from the data
features = model.predict(data)
examples.explanation: This code example demonstrates feature extraction using a pretrained VGG16 model. The pretrained model is loaded, and features are extracted from the data using the predict method.
